task: Execute Clerk Billing integration plan (Iteration 4 — custom UI path)

stories.title: Document Step 0 spike checklist (human-gated)
acceptanceCriteria: A .omc/human-tasks/step-0-spike-checklist.md file exists with step-by-step instructions the user must run in their Clerk dashboard to validate: (a) pla/fea JWT claims are exposed in ctx.auth.getUserIdentity(), (b) @clerk/react/experimental exports useCheckout/usePaymentElement/usePlans/CheckoutProvider/PaymentElement/PaymentElementProvider
The checklist includes concrete commands to run (pnpm test, Convex query inspectIdentity, client-side import smoke test)
A temp file convex/billing-spike.ts exists for the user to run the inspectIdentity query, with a comment that it must be deleted after spike completes

stories.title: Add requireAuth() to 5 unguarded mutations in convex/studio.ts
acceptanceCriteria: createRun, updateRunAnalysis, reanalyze, submitRun, retryGeneration in convex/studio.ts each call requireAuth() and scope writes by userId where applicable
Ownership verified on mutations that read/modify existing runs/generations (throw 'Not authorized' on mismatch)
pnpm build completes without TypeScript errors
No existing functionality broken — grep confirms no callers pass userId explicitly expecting un-authed behavior

stories.title: Add requireAuth() to 7 unguarded mutations in convex/board.ts
acceptanceCriteria: createColumn, createItem, deleteItem, updateItem, updateColumn, updateBoard, deleteColumn in convex/board.ts each call requireAuth()
pnpm build completes without TypeScript errors
Board is explicitly out-of-scope for billing gates — no requireCapability calls added here

stories.title: Document Step 2 Clerk dashboard checklist (human-gated)
acceptanceCriteria: A .omc/human-tasks/step-2-dashboard-checklist.md file exists with concrete instructions to (a) enable Billing on dev instance with Clerk dev gateway, (b) create Basic and Pro plans with exact slugs 'basic' / 'pro' matching PLAN_CONFIG, (c) set prices $49.99/mo-$39.99-annual for Basic and $129.99/mo-$99-annual for Pro, (d) create 5 capability features with slugs matching CAPABILITIES, (e) assign all 5 capabilities to both Basic and Pro
The checklist specifies that plan slugs in Clerk dashboard MUST match PLAN_CONFIG keys exactly — drift is caught by billing-gates.test.ts

stories.title: Create capability registry + plan config + types
acceptanceCriteria: convex/lib/billing/capabilities.ts exists, exports CAPABILITIES const object + Capability type
convex/lib/billing/planConfig.ts exists, exports PLAN_CONFIG for 'basic' and 'pro' with correct productLimit (5, 20), monthlyCredits (100, 500), all 5 capabilities each
convex/lib/billing/planConfig.ts exports PlanConfig type
pnpm build compiles both files without errors
No raw-string capability slugs used in helpers — all references use CAPABILITIES.*

stories.title: Create versioned claim extractor + BillingProvider interface + Clerk impl
acceptanceCriteria: convex/lib/billing/claims.ts exports extractBillingClaims(identity, version='v1') with a v1 branch handling Clerk's 'u:slug'/'o:slug' prefix stripping
convex/lib/billing/provider.ts exports BillingProvider interface and BillingContext type
convex/lib/billing/provider.clerk.ts exports ClerkBillingProvider class implementing BillingProvider.getContext
pnpm build compiles all three files without errors
No Clerk-specific types leak past provider.clerk.ts — higher layers depend only on BillingContext

stories.title: Add billingEvents schema + public billing helpers index
acceptanceCriteria: convex/schema.ts includes billingEvents table with fields userId, mutationName, capability (optional), allowed, claimedPlan (optional), timestamp, units (optional), metadata (optional v.any), context (optional union of enforcement/checkout/webhook/usage) and indexes by_userId, by_timestamp, by_capability
convex/lib/billing/index.ts exports getBillingContext, requireCapability, requireProductLimit, requireCredit, recordCreditUse — all typed against Capability (no raw strings accepted)
All helpers honor BILLING_ENABLED env var (short-circuit to allow when !== 'true')
requireCapability throws 'No active subscription — choose a plan at /pricing' when user has no recognized plan
pnpm build compiles
npx convex dev --once succeeds (or equivalent schema push validation)

stories.title: Wire billing enforcement into products.ts, studio.ts, productImages.ts
acceptanceCriteria: convex/products.ts: createProduct calls requireProductLimit; generateFromProduct / generateVariations call requireCapability(CAPABILITIES.GENERATE_VARIATIONS) + requireCredit + recordCreditUse; removeProductBackground calls requireCapability(CAPABILITIES.REMOVE_BACKGROUND) (no credit)
convex/studio.ts submitRun calls same gates as generateFromProduct; retryGeneration calls requireCredit + recordCreditUse
convex/productImages.ts removeImageBackground calls requireCapability(CAPABILITIES.REMOVE_BACKGROUND)
No raw capability strings — all calls use CAPABILITIES.*
pnpm build compiles

stories.title: Add getBillingStatus Convex query + billing-gates test
acceptanceCriteria: convex/lib/billing/index.ts exports a getBillingStatus Convex query returning { plan, productCount, productLimit, creditsUsed, creditsTotal, resetsOn }

tests/billing-gates.test.ts exists and covers: (a) every CAPABILITIES entry appears in PLAN_CONFIG, (b) every PLAN_CONFIG capability is declared in CAPABILITIES, (c) each billing-gated mutation throws when called with free/no-plan mock identity, (d) quota exhaustion on Basic at 100
pnpm test passes the new test suite (skip in CI if convex-test isn't configured — at minimum test the pure registry/config consistency which has no runtime deps)
pnpm build compiles

stories.title: Build custom /pricing route with usePlans + Mantine plan cards
acceptanceCriteria: src/routes/pricing.tsx exists with TanStack Router createFileRoute
src/components/billing/PlanCard.tsx renders a single plan card using Mantine
The route uses usePlans({ for: 'user' }) from @clerk/react/experimental — confined inside src/components/billing/**
Monthly/annual toggle works; highlights current plan if user is subscribed via has({plan})
Subscribe CTA navigates to /checkout?planId=<id>&period=<month|annual>
pnpm build compiles

stories.title: Build custom /checkout route with CheckoutProvider + useCheckout + PaymentElement
acceptanceCriteria: src/routes/checkout.tsx exists and reads planId+period from search params
src/components/billing/CheckoutForm.tsx uses CheckoutProvider + useCheckout + usePaymentElement + PaymentElement per Clerk's reference example, all imports from @clerk/react/experimental
src/lib/billing/stripeAppearance.ts exports a function that maps Mantine theme tokens to Stripe Elements appearance config
Order summary shows plan + price; submit triggers submit() → confirm() → finalize() flow
Errors surface via Mantine Alert; loading states use Mantine Loader
pnpm build compiles

stories.title: Build /account/billing subscription management route
acceptanceCriteria: src/routes/account/billing.tsx exists
src/components/billing/CurrentSubscriptionCard.tsx displays current plan, payment method (last 4 masked), next renewal date
Change plan link to /pricing; Cancel subscription action with Mantine Modal confirmation
pnpm build compiles

stories.title: Post-checkout interstitial + clerk.session.reload() + polling
acceptanceCriteria: src/components/billing/PostCheckoutInterstitial.tsx exists as a Mantine Modal
On mount calls clerk.session?.reload() then polls getBillingStatus Convex query every 500ms up to 10s
Dismisses and navigates to /studio when getBillingStatus returns the just-subscribed plan
10s timeout shows 'Still activating — try refreshing' with retry button
CheckoutForm integrates the interstitial into the finalize() flow

stories.title: Studio UI capability gating + credits indicator
acceptanceCriteria: src/routes/studio.$productId.tsx wraps variation controls with <Show when={{feature: CAPABILITIES.GENERATE_VARIATIONS}}>, background-removal button with CAPABILITIES.REMOVE_BACKGROUND, premium templates with CAPABILITIES.ADVANCED_TEMPLATES
src/components/billing/CreditsIndicator.tsx displays live credits usage from getBillingStatus query
src/routes/studio.index.tsx shows product count (N/limit) and credits indicator; disables generation buttons when credits exhausted; shows 'Upgrade' prompt
No inline capability strings — all refs use CAPABILITIES.*
pnpm build compiles

stories.title: Update __root.tsx nav with Pricing + Billing links behind VITE_BILLING_ENABLED
acceptanceCriteria: src/routes/__root.tsx adds NavLink to /pricing between Home and Studio
Mobile drawer adds equivalent MobileNavLink
Signed-in user's nav includes a Billing link to /account/billing
Both links wrapped so they only show when VITE_BILLING_ENABLED is 'true'
pnpm build compiles

stories.title: Pin Clerk packages exact + document env vars
acceptanceCriteria: package.json: @clerk/react is pinned to exact version (no ^ or ~)
package.json: @clerk/clerk-js added as explicit dependency pinned to same minor as @clerk/react
.env.example updated with VITE_BILLING_ENABLED (client) and notes that BILLING_ENABLED is set in Convex dashboard (server runtime)
.omc/human-tasks/env-setup.md documents the full env var matrix with where to set each one

stories.title: Document Step 6 rollout checklist (human-gated)
acceptanceCriteria: .omc/human-tasks/step-6-rollout-checklist.md exists with phased deployment instructions
Default rollout option is X (comp existing users 30-day Basic) as specified in the plan — documents how to issue comp subscriptions via Clerk admin/API
Concrete rollback steps documented (flip BILLING_ENABLED=false in Convex dashboard)
Monitoring thresholds + actions listed

stories.title: Final architect verification
acceptanceCriteria: Architect agent reviews the full change set (all code stories) against the plan's acceptance criteria
pnpm build runs green
tests/billing-gates.test.ts passes
lsp_diagnostics shows 0 errors on the files touched
Architect returns PROCEED or PROCEED WITH REFINEMENTS (not BLOCK)
